channel.title: Secure Future Initiative on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Secure Future Initiative on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Securing our future: July 2026 progress report on Microsoft’s Secure Future Initiative
item.description:
Microsoft published its July 2026 Secure Future Initiative progress report, summarizing work on secure foundations, AI-assisted defense, and broader cybersecurity readiness. The provided text is only a brief overview and does not include specific implementation details or metrics.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
